title: Mallow & The Street of the Fallen
description:
"Mallow & The Street of the Fallen" is an RPG game produced by エンタングルメント and published by Hanabi games.

In the peaceful kingdom of Anatar, a young brawler named Mallow takes off for an adventure with her childhood friend Theo. Their goal is to reach the maountain Blankmont, which is said to have the most ferocious beasts in the nothern part of the kingdom. Join Mallow in her pursuit of becoming the strongest adventurer in the world!

• High freedom of exploration

• JRPG elements

• Turn-based combat

• Rich interactive storylines
